title.en: Ye Tian took out the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao...

content.en:
"Lord Wanxiang Heavenly Emperor, this is the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Item!"

Ye Tian took out the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item.

The Wanxiang Heavenly Emperor took a look at it and confirmed that the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item had not been consumed, so he hurriedly put it away.

"Guys, I'll take you back again!"

After that, they kept shuttling and shuttled, and it took some time before returning to the Tensun Fortress.

After that, Ye Tian was sent back to the Winter Night Fortress.

Not long after, under the operation of the Sioux clan, Ye Tian successfully obtained the official membership of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

The Su Domain Lord personally gave Ye Tian an identity token for an official member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

"Ye Tian, this is your identity token, after refining, you can become an official member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and you can also log in to the Supreme Void, the information released by the Innate Origin Alliance is released in the Supreme Void, and it is more convenient to contact in the Supreme Void. "

Su Domain Lord said.

Then, the Su Domain Lord left.

And after Ye Tian refined the identity token, he logged in to the Supreme Void.

He also learned from the Su Domain Lord that the Supreme Void was a special void opened up by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance with a supreme treasure that surpassed the Nine Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon as the core, and when the consciousness entered it, it could communicate with other official members of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

"The Supreme Void is the virtual world on Earth at the beginning, but the grade is countless times higher. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He wandered around the Supreme Void and found that the official members of the Innate Origin Alliance almost only used the Supreme Void as a place to trade, issuing various acquisition tasks, and this place seemed to have become a place of trading.

This is also normal, at the level of the Supreme Dao Realm, if you want to be entertained, a single thought can transform countless time and space, what entertainment do you want?

Therefore, the Supreme Void has no entertainment for them, only for trading or learning about the latest information, etc.

Ye Tian walked around for a while, but he also felt bored, so he withdrew directly from the Supreme Void.

......

Mysteriously curious.

Ye Tian's copy body left here was subject to the erosion of the origin of the black aura all the time, but he didn't care, this erosion was not very fast, he could maintain it for a long time.

If you can't maintain it, you can continue to copy your real body.

Ye Tian was constantly looking for various resources in this strange place, of course, what he wanted most was to find the strange things of the Supreme Dao that contained the rules of the Fifth Sequence of the Supreme Dao.

"The Great Ghost River Secret Technique!"

"The Great Ghost River Secret Technique!"

"The Great Ghost River Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian used this secret technique again and again to find the Dao Strange Things, but he couldn't find the Dao Strange Things.

"Could it really be that there is only this one supreme strange thing?"

Ye Tian frowned.

According to convention, after this one Supreme Dao Strange Thing is killed, it will take an infinite era before it can continue to breed a second Supreme Dao Strange Thing.

He couldn't wait that long!

"Keep looking, maybe you'll find something like the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the long years that followed, he searched every inch of soil in this treasure land.

Gradually, Ye Tian collected a lot of resources.

However, these resources could only allow him to improve his cultivation in the Sixth Rank Supreme Dao Realm faster, but they could not allow him to comprehend the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao.

Mysteriously deep underground.

this day.

Ye Tian found a black stone, and as soon as he touched this black stone, an incomparably terrifying black aura poured into his origin, eroding his origin at a speed of a hundred times that of this mysterious and strange land.

But.

Ye Tian sensed an even more terrifying trace of supreme rule power from this black stone.

"Could it be that this thing has a similar effect to the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He's going to experiment with it.

So, he let one of his copy bodies directly swallow this black stone and refine it, but in this way, his copy body couldn't hold on for long.

"Refining!"

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's physical body was gradually collapsing, but he sensed a more powerful supreme rule.

The fifth sequence is the rule of the Tao!

"You can really comprehend the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

I've been looking for something for a long time, and I've really found it!

If he had enough of this kind of black stone, he would definitely be able to comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

Subsequently, he inquired in the Supreme Void about this black stone, and he really found it.

【Black Abyss Devouring Stone】

This kind of stone is even rarer than the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone, but no Dao Realm will refine it, that is an act of seeking death.

Of course, this kind of stone is extremely rare, and the Supreme Void is not sold in the Dao Realm.

"Continue to look for this Black Abyss Devouring Stone in this mysterious place, maybe you can find more!"

Time passes.

In the following years, Ye Tian found one Black Abyss Devouring Stone after another, but the Black Abyss Devouring Stone here was really rare and rare.

Before you know it, dozens of solstice eras have passed.

"There are a total of twenty-six Black Abyss Devouring Stones, which can almost make me comprehend the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao!"

Subsequently.

Here he contemplated the Fifth Sequence of Dao rules again and again, copying his body and scrapping one body after another.

Nearly a hundred years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally succeeded in comprehending a trace of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!

At this time, Ye Tian's body was filled with a terrifying aura, and the coercion of the whole person became even more terrifying.

"Fivefold to the Dao Realm, comprehend the rules of the Fifth Sequence to the Dao, and say it, those Ninefold to the Dao Realm probably don't believe it. Ye Tian said with a smile.

Moreover, after comprehending the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, his body began to undergo slight changes, which was the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules subtly changing his body structure, making his body structure more perfect and more powerful.

"It's a pity that the cultivation is still in the early stage of the sixfold Dao realm, and it is too difficult to advance to the middle stage of the sixfold Dao realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

this day.

He inquired in the Supreme Dao Void about how to quickly improve his cultivation, and he really found a resource, not the Heavenly Blood Myeloid, although the Heavenly Blood Myeloid is also very good, but for him in the Sixfold Dao Realm, the effect is average, even if he obtains thousands of drops of Heavenly Blood Myeloid, he will not be able to advance his cultivation to the middle of the Sixfold Dao Realm.

And the day of the tribulation is getting closer and closer, and there is not much time for him to cultivate.

Strictly speaking, this kind of resource he found was a secret medicine, and the secret medicine that was refined, the Heavenly Blood Xuan Marrow, was actually a secret medicine.

【To Blood Elixir】

This is a secret medicine resource that Ye Tian found, it takes more than three hundred extremely rare resources to refine it, and the official members of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance can exchange the formula of this secret medicine, but they must not leak it out, and they need to make an oath.
